name: Hongchang International Co., Ltd
business: Hongchang International, through its subsidiary Fuqing Hongchang Food, is constructing the Hongchang Food Industrial Park and has commenced limited food trade, including sales of beef and mutton.

exposures.sentence: We generated revenue of $2,867,102 for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to $2,675,789 for the year ended 2023, due to launch of our new beef and mutton supplying business at the end of 2024.
Its main asset is its investment in the food industrial park, which was obtained by bidding in September 2020 and is currently under construction.
